rationale.R1.4: Novelty claim is overstated; prior work has similar rates in non-uniform smoothness regime.
rationale.R1.7: Citation to Volkov & Petrenko (2018) cannot be verified, and the reference may be fabricated or misattributed.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure: I could not verify 'Volkov and Petrenko (2018, Theorem 3.2)' and suspect it may be fabricated or misattributed — please confirm against the actual source.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence: The complexity statement is under-specified; iteration complexity vs. gradient-oracle complexity matters here.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance: The output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (unverifiable citation).
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability: The Lyapunov-argument paragraph promises the novelty is 'a restart schedule tied to the importance-sampling probabilities p_i ∝ √L_i', but this is not clearly explained.
